headline: Get insights into the top movers in the S&P500 index of Friday's pre-market session.
summary: The US market is yet to commence its session on Friday, but let's get a preview of the pre-market session and explore the top S&P500 gainers and losers driving the early market movements.

headline: Parnassus Growth Equity Fund Q1 2026 Portfolio Activity
summary: We are actively monitoring Meta Platforms' social and data privacy risks and believe the company has made progress on strengthening its policies and enforcement.
